.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved string concatenation parts to a new line for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Collapsed multi-line constant definitions into single lines for brevity.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH defined on single lines

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard coding style guides.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords in nested conditionals for consistency.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords in directory creation checks.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords in mkdirs check.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved 'new Authenticator()' to a new line and adjusted indentation

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed unnecessary trailing newline at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed empty line after closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for newer Spring Boot versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Update active profiles logging to show default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update @EnableJpaRepositories annotation to use explicit array syntax for the basePackages attribute.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 compatibility.
Remove Zalando Problem modules from Jackson configuration, likely due to dependency removal or migration to a different error handling strategy in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot version.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ API.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and antMatchers() with requestMatchers() for Spring Security 5.7+ compatibility.
Update header configuration to use lambda-based DSL and replace deprecated featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy.
Remove custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling in favor of standard OAuth2 BearerToken handlers.
Replace manual CorsFilter injection with a dedicated SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
Externalize Content Security Policy configuration to JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding it in the security config.
Remove custom JWTConfigurer application as JWT handling is likely moved to standard Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server configuration.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader matching instead of directory-based paths.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with patterns like '/*.js', '/*.css', and '/content/**'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because UTF-8 is guaranteed to be supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints instead of Swagger 2.
